<!--
type-wave is an experimental, single-maintainer project. Small, focused fixes are
welcome. For larger changes, please open an issue to discuss first — unsolicited
large PRs may not be merged. There is no SLA on review.

TITLE: this PR's title must be a Conventional Commit, e.g. `fix(hud): stop flicker`.
We merge squash-only, so the title becomes the commit + changelog line. Use `!`
(e.g. `feat!:`) for breaking changes. See CONTRIBUTING.md → "Commit and PR conventions".
-->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link any related issue. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Small improvement
- [ ] Larger change (discussed first in issue #___)

## Checklist

- [ ] Single, focused concern
- [ ] `nix develop --command zig build test` passes
- [ ] Uses the project vocabulary from CONTEXT.md
- [ ] Matches the surrounding code style
